description_long: This is a rectangular, dark brown bottle with a black label and a black cap, closely resembling a classic Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey bottle. The bottle features a wide, square base that tapers slightly as it rises, with distinct, sharp shoulders leading to a cylindrical neck. The front label is ornate, with white text and decorative borders, while the sides and back display additional branding, awards, and product information in white on black. The cap is tall and ribbed, likely made of plastic, and appears to be a screw cap. The bottle's surface is glossy, suggesting it is made of glass, and the label is paper or plastic. No visible liquid is seen inside, and the bottle appears undamaged and intact.
description: A dark brown, rectangular glass bottle with a black screw cap and ornate white-on-black Jack Daniel's branding. The bottle is glossy, undamaged, and features detailed labels on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey label with ornate white text and borders.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a label with awards and medals, mostly text-based in white on black.
description_view_2: Back view with product information, barcodes, and additional branding details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more branding, including white graphics and text, less prominent than the front.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features prominent Jack Daniel's branding in ornate white text on a black label on the front, with additional white text and graphics on the sides and back, including awards, product information, and barcodes.
